# The Content Vault

> A curated, community-maintained collection of marketing wisdom and vibe coding insights from real builders on X (Twitter) and Instagram.

## What This Site Is

The Content Vault is an open-source resource with two sections:

- **Marketing**: Real-world advice on content strategy, personal branding, community building, Web3 marketing, copywriting, and growth — sourced from practitioners on X/Twitter.
- **Vibe Coding**: Practical tips on AI coding tools & stacks, prompting techniques, developer workflow/productivity, and project ideas — sourced from builders on X/Twitter and Instagram Reels.

## Content Format

Each item in the vault is either:
- A **Tweet**: A post from X/Twitter with author handle, text, category, and link to original
- A **Reel**: An Instagram reel with author, caption/key takeaway, category, and link to original

All content is community-curated and upvoted. Items are organized by section (Marketing / Vibe Coding) and sub-category.

## Categories

Marketing: Content Strategy, Personal Branding, Community Building, Web3 Marketing, Copywriting, Growth
Vibe Coding: AI Tools & Stacks, Prompting Tips, Workflow / Productivity, Project Ideas

## Who It's For

Marketers, builders, and creators who want curated, actionable advice without the noise.

## Source

Open source on GitHub: https://github.com/curiousleeo/content-vault
Live site: https://marketing-tweets-repo.vercel.app
